selection_policy.filter: Exclude [import] entries and zero-sized functions from --list results.
selection_policy.strategy: Deterministic size quantiles over the filtered internal function list, then replace the trivial smallest quantile with a more representative small function. Final set: small, medium, medium-heavy, heavy, giant.
